# ROS Global Solutions

> Total engineering solutions provider specializing in Oil & Gas equipment, HVAC systems, Data Center filtration & cooling, and Rhamnolipids bio-surfactants. Based in Sharjah, UAE. Custom-engineered supply for any requirement.

## About

ROS Global Solutions FZE is an industrial engineering company providing specialized consulting and product supply solutions across multiple sectors worldwide. We deliver mission-critical products and services to the oil & gas, HVAC, data center, and biotechnology industries. We specialize in custom-engineered solutions and can supply as per any requirement.

**Contact:**
- Email: inquiry@rosglobal.com
- Phone: +971 6 704 1447
- Location: 16G-01, Hamriya Free Zone, Sharjah, UAE

## Product Lines

### [Oil & Gas Equipment](https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas)
Complete oil and gas equipment solutions — custom-sourced for your project requirements:
- [Field Surface Facility — Electrical](https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-electrical): Power distribution, control panels, hazardous area equipment, safety systems
- [Field Surface Facility — Mechanical](https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-mechanical): Pumps, compressors, valves, process vessels, piping systems
- [Field Surface Facility — Instrumentation](https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/field-surface-facility-instrumentation): Smart transmitters, flow meters, safety instruments, wireless monitoring
- [Drilling — Rig Spaces & Mud Pumps](https://rosglobal.com/oil-gas/drilling-rig-spaces-mud-pumps): Mud pumps, consumables, rig floor equipment, solids control

### [HVAC Solutions](https://rosglobal.com/hvac)
Industrial-grade climate control and filtration — exclusive Bry-Air MENA distributor:
- [Bry-Air Desiccant Dehumidifiers](https://rosglobal.com/hvac/desiccant-dehumidifiers): EcoDry & BrySmart® series, precision humidity control, tropicalized for Gulf climate
- [Bry-Air Gas-Phase Air Filtration](https://rosglobal.com/hvac/gas-phase-air-filtration): DRISORB™ chemical filters, corrosive gas removal, data center protection
- [Celdec Evaporative Cooling Pads](https://rosglobal.com/hvac/celdec-cooling-pads): High-efficiency cellulose media, energy-efficient cooling
- [Industrial Gas Filters](https://rosglobal.com/hvac/industrial-gas-filters): Activated carbon, chemical media, VOC and odour removal

### [Data Center Solutions](https://rosglobal.com/datacenter)
Specialized filtration, cooling, and environmental control for critical infrastructure:
- [Air Filtration Systems](https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/air-filtration-systems): Multi-stage particulate filtration, HEPA/ULPA, fan filter units
- [Chemical Filtration](https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/chemical-filtration): Corrosive gas removal, corrosion monitoring, custom media blends
- [Precision Cooling](https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/precision-cooling): CRAC/CRAH, in-row cooling, liquid cooling, containment systems
- [Environmental Control](https://rosglobal.com/datacenter/environmental-control): Integrated monitoring, predictive maintenance, unified management

### [Rhamnolipids Bio-Surfactants](https://rosglobal.com/rhamnolipids)
Exclusive MENA distributor of AGAE Technologies:
- 100% Biodegradable bio-surfactants
- Applications: Oil recovery (MEOR), Personal care, Agriculture, Environmental remediation
- Purity grades from 85% to 99%
